app.name: A11yFred
app.tagline: Good news, everyone! Finding descriptions, stat!
common.skip_to_main: Skip to the main content, meatbag
header.github: Fork on GitHub, you magnificent robot
header.close_settings: Close settings, I'm not made of time
about.what_heading: What in the name of Zoid is this?
about.what_body: Good news, everyone! It's your accessibility audit writing assistant. If you've done a few audits, you've done them all — probably in your sleep, like I do. We keep running into the same issues. Over and over. Like Bender finding trouble.
about.what_body_2: Consistency, baby! Search this library of WCAG-aligned findings, grab one that fits, customize it, and paste it into your report. Easy as a Slurm delivery.
about.what_wcag: Data extends up to {wcag} (Level A and AA, not that you'd notice).
about.examples_intro: Examples include, but are not limited to:
about.how_heading: How to use it — it's not rocket science. Well, maybe a little.
about.step_1_body: Type what you observed — a component name, element type, or a sad description of the problem.
about.step_2_body: Use Priority Up/Down on each result to tune rankings. Star to show first. Archive to bury forever.
about.step_3_body: Select the finding that best matches. Results ranked by relevance, like a Demolition Derby of accessibility.
about.step_4_body: Add a location prefix (e.g. "Global:") or use AI to reword — because why not?
about.step_5_body: Paste the description and suggested fix directly into your report. Done. Easy. Neat.
about.feature_ai_body: Refine any finding with a short note. Your API key, your AI — never stored server-side. Not that I'd trust any server.
about.feature_languages_body: UI in over 50 languages including RTL. Switch in Settings, you cosmopolitan genius.
about.feature_party_body: It exists. In Settings. Under Appearance. You'll know it when you see it. Woop woop woop!
about.feature_a11y_body: Built to WCAG 2.2: focus management, live regions, keyboard navigation, reduced motion, high-contrast tokens. Very impressive. I'm serious.
about.sources_body: Entries written in plain language, near-duplicates consolidated, each aligned to a WCAG success criterion. Sources used include:
about.coming_auth: Optional sign-in with Google or GitHub to sync settings across your primitive devices.
about.coming_custom: Add and edit your own custom findings, stored privately in the cloud. Yes, that cloud.
about.coming_ai: More AI providers: OpenAI, Google Gemini, and more. The future is now, old man.
search.label: Describe the finding or observation, meatbag
search.placeholder: e.g. modal close button no label — unacceptable!
search.hint_live: Results appear as you type. Neat.
search.hint_submit: Type a description and press Search or Enter. It's not that hard.
search.hint_platform: Currently focusing on {platform} issues. Focused. Like a laser.
search.hint_ai: AI assist is active ({provider}). Our silicon overlord is listening.
search.hint_voting: Prioritize up or down to change ranking — starred results appear first. Simple.
search.view_all_confirm_body: This will dump {count} results onto one single page. Think carefully.
search.hint_change_in: These options can be changed in
results.vote_hint: Prioritize up or down — higher means it shows up higher. Star first. Archive to hide. All reversible, unlike some decisions I've made.
announce.starred: {title} starred — will appear first in relevant results. Good choice.
announce.archived: {title} archived and hidden from results. Gone, but not forgotten.
results.no_results_announce: No results for "{query}". Try a component name, element type, or a different phrase. Maybe be more specific.
results.no_results_body: Try a component name, element type, or a different phrase. You can do it.
severity.high: I don't want to live on this planet anymore
detail.location_placeholder: e.g. Global: / Cart: / That weird page nobody visits:
detail.refine_hint_ai: Describe what to change and AI will rewrite it with your details. Change your AI model or turn this off in
detail.refine_hint_no_ai: Use this space for notes. Enable AI Assist in
detail.refine_hint_no_ai_suffix: and it will rewrite based on your notes. Like magic. Robot magic.
detail.refine_placeholder_ai: e.g. this is on mobile, element is a tooltip that defies logic
detail.refine_placeholder_no_ai: Example: "Critical findings like this appear throughout the entire app. Fix one and ten more appear. It's beautiful, in a horrible way."
detail.rewrite_aria: Save note and revise selected fields with AI
detail.nothing_to_copy_body: This field is empty. There is literally nothing here. Nothing.
detail.confirm_reset_body: You've made significant changes. Resetting removes all edits. All of them. Gone.
detail.related_heading: Similar or related issues (it's always related):
detail.copied_announce: {label}: Copied to clipboard. Go forth and paste.
detail.undo_last_announce: Revision undone. Time travel is possible after all.
detail.copy_all_aria: Copy description and suggested fix together
detail.copy_all_announce: Finding Details / Description and Possible Remediation Steps copied. Neat.
detail.reset_all_fields_aria: Reset description and suggested fix to original values
detail.reset_all_fields_announce: Finding Details / Description and Possible Remediation Steps reset to original.
detail.edit_lang_warning: Edits are session-only — switching language or finding will reset them. You've been warned.
edit.target_dialog_body: You're editing a finding while viewing it in {locale}. This is fine.
edit.save_as_personal_desc: Stored locally. Private. Other languages get AI-translated unless you edit them. No warranties expressed or implied.
edit.contribute_desc: Your edit goes to the maintainer for review before joining the shared corpus. Democracy in action.
edit.scope_all_langs_desc: Other languages get re-translated from updated English on the next pass. Efficient.
edit.personal_ai_warning: Only {locale} will be saved. Others show AI-translated text. Updated during maintenance only.
edit.en_switch_dialog_body: Your {locale} version is saved. Here's the English version. Edit and save, or skip — no pressure.
edit.personal_saved: Saved to your personal entries. Good job.
edit.contribution_queued: Edit queued for review. The maintainer thanks you. Probably.
contributions.empty: No pending contributions. Nothing to see here.
detail.revise_desc_checkbox: Include Finding Details / Description in revision
detail.ai_updated_announce: Selected fields updated. The robot has spoken.
detail.revise_error_body: Something went wrong while revising. Press Save & Revise Selected to try again. Or blame the robot.
detail.revise_error_invalid_key: Invalid or expired API key ({provider}). Double-check your key in Settings, you absent-minded genius.
detail.revise_error_rate_limit: Rate limit reached ({provider}). Wait a moment. The robot needs a breather.
detail.revise_error_service_error: {provider} service error ({status}). Try again in a few seconds. These things happen.
detail.revise_error_network_error: No internet connection. Check your connection. Are you living in the past?
settings.heading: Settings
settings.language_desc: Use the dropdown and Change button to select a new one. The change won't be saved until you press Save. Simple, right?
settings.language_changed_announce: Language: Changed. Press Save to confirm.
settings.voting_on: Sort Priority controls are visible on each result.
settings.voting_off: Sort Priority controls are hidden. Simpler that way.
settings.ai_enable_desc: Rewrites text based on your refinement notes. The future is now.
settings.privacy_body_1: API keys are stored locally in your browser (localStorage) and sent only to the AI provider — never to any intermediate server. Trust, but verify.
settings.privacy_body_2: This app stores: theme preference, language preference, platform filter, live search setting, active AI provider, one API key per provider, voting data (votes, stars, archived items), recently viewed finding IDs, any findings you create (localStorage), and last open finding ID (sessionStorage — cleared when tab closes). Nothing else. We're not monsters.
settings.privacy_body_translations: UI translations were generated with AI and may contain errors. We know. No custom data is ever sent for translation.
settings.api_key_error: Error: API key is required when AI Assist is enabled. That's just how it works.
settings.no_changes_body: Nothing to save. Come back when you've done something.
settings.confirm_reset_all_body: This will nuke all saved settings — including API keys — and return everything to defaults. Cannot be undone. You sure about this?
settings.reset_all_announce: All settings reset. Fresh start. You're welcome.
settings.unsaved_body: You have unsaved AI settings. What do you want to do about it?
settings.reduced_motion_note: You have reduced motion turned on, and we respect that. Animations like confetti will be skipped until you change it in your OS accessibility settings. Very sensible.
settings.wcag_filter_desc: Filter findings by WCAG version and conformance level. Each version includes all findings from earlier versions. Logical.
error.announce: Sweet zombie Jesus — the finding library could not be loaded. Check your connection and try again.
error.heading: Sweet Zombie Jesus
error.body: The finding library could not be loaded. Check your connection and
notfound.heading: 404 — I don't want to live on this planet anymore
notfound.body: This page doesn't exist. Let's pretend it never happened and go home.
footer.credit: Built by your digital neighbor, Mikey Ilagan
party.announce_full: Party mode activated! The font has changed to Comic Sans. The colors have shifted to a random bright palette. Confetti rains from above. The cursor is now a magic wand. Woop woop woop!
party.announce_reduced: Party mode activated! The font has changed to Comic Sans. Colors have shifted. Confetti skipped because reduced motion is on. Still pretty good.
kofi.title: Ko-fi donation widget
results.copy_link_aria: [EN] Copy link to these search results
search.hint_pin: [EN] Pin any result to keep it at the top across all views.
about.feature_pinning_body: Pin any finding to keep it at the top across all searches and views. Use the priority arrows to rank others, star to float a finding to the very top, or archive to remove it from view.
settings.pinned_results_desc: Items you've pinned appear above all search results.
settings.agentic_mode_desc: AI will search your corpus to match your style and technical depth when rewriting.
detail.agentic_mode_help: AI searches the corpus to match your style and depth when rewriting
detail.agentic_mode_hint: AI will search the corpus to match your established style and technical depth
